episodes.title: The Rhythm of a Sound Heart

avatarLines.open: A sound heart has a rhythm. Not frantic, not comparing, but steady enough to give life.
avatarLines.pivot: You are not stuck with envy as your rhythm. Gratitude can tune the heart again.
avatarLines.close: A quiet heart can heal what envy keeps inflaming. Be Wise. Be Well.

brollKeywords: diverse adults in calm morning prayer
CPR training hands keeping steady rhythm
phone apps draining battery abstract visual
heart monitor gentle pulse close up
multiethnic friends celebrating without comparison
quiet room with soft sunlight and journal
musical rhythm wave abstract animation

episodes.title: You Know That Thing Magnets Do...

avatarLines.open: You know that thing magnets do? Turn one around, and suddenly there is invisible resistance.
avatarLines.pivot: A gentle answer is trained strength. It creates space for peace to enter the room.
avatarLines.close: Try softer, not harder; wisdom cools what anger started. Be Wise. Be Well.

brollKeywords: diverse coworkers having calm conversation
magnets repelling on clean tabletop
family kitchen tension softening
invisible force field abstract light wave
person pausing before replying to text
community mediation circle respectful listening
thermostat cooling warm room metaphor

episodes.title: The Greatest Teacher

avatarLines.open: GPS has made us both bold and helpless. One little word can change the whole mood: rerouting.
avatarLines.pivot: Your heart can teach your mouth before your words take the wrong exit.
avatarLines.close: Self-taught by God, my heart tutors every word. Be Wise. Be Well.

person pausing before difficult conversation
classroom chalkboard wisdom metaphor

glowing route line recalculating abstract

episodes.title: Quiet Tastes Better

avatarLines.open: A simple table can become a feast when peace is present.
avatarLines.pivot: Sometimes wisdom is not walking into the fight. Sometimes wisdom is making the room easier to breathe in.
avatarLines.close: Quiet tastes better when peace helps the soul absorb. Be Wise. Be Well.

brollKeywords: diverse family sharing simple meal peacefully
dry bread on rustic table warm light
quiet kitchen after conflict resolves
empty dining room with calm atmosphere
gentle apology between friends at home

hands clearing kitchen counter peacefully

episodes.title: Eat Your Words

avatarLines.open: Spoken words can feel free until the bill arrives.
avatarLines.pivot: Speak words today you would not mind living on tomorrow.
avatarLines.close: Indulge life-giving words; you'll gladly eat that fruit. Be Wise. Be Well.

episodes.title: What's Your Algorithm?

avatarLines.open: All of us have patterns running under the surface, almost like an inner algorithm.
avatarLines.pivot: There is something stronger than the algorithm. The counsel of the Lord stands.
avatarLines.close: Your inner algorithm needs God's counsel to stand. Be Wise. Be Well.

brollKeywords: diverse person journaling repeated reactions
abstract code overlay on human heart

person pausing before defensive response
old machinery becoming new light metaphor
mentor conversation in urban park
algorithm flowchart dissolving into calm path

episodes.title: Walking Without The Whole Map

avatarLines.open: Sometimes your steps can be ordered by God before they are understood by you.
avatarLines.pivot: Maybe God is not giving you the whole map. Maybe He is giving you the next faithful step.
avatarLines.close: Ordered steps may feed someone before they make sense. Be Wise. Be Well.
